name: goatide-bridge
description: First-party bridge between the GoatIDE kernel sidecar and the editor process. Phase-4 Verification Canvas owner.

goatide.contracts.highImpactAllowlist.description: Path prefixes that mark high-impact contract files; saves to these paths force the modal Verification Canvas tier.

goatide.session.priority.description: Current development session priority. Cited DecisionNodes whose derived_under_priority does not exact-match this value are flagged in the Verification Canvas as IntentDrift (Phase 7 Plan 07-05 / DRIFT-02).
enumDescriptions: Optimize for shipping speed; quality + safety tradeoffs accepted.
Optimize for code quality; speed tradeoffs accepted.
Optimize for runtime safety + correctness; speed + cost tradeoffs accepted.
Optimize for runtime cost; quality tradeoffs accepted.
